name: Squad Dashboard
description: A read-only web dashboard for any Squad-enabled repo. Visualizes the live .squad/ state — roster, routing, models, casting, decisions, sessions, ceremonies, skills, analytics, and health — served by a zero-dependency Node read server.

upstream.notes: Read-only viewer. The HTML UI and the Node read server are NOT installed by Squad (executable/non-.squad files are not allowed in plugin payloads); copy tools/squad-dashboard.html and tools/squad-server.mjs into your project and run: node tools/squad-server.mjs (open http://localhost:4317). The server auto-locates .squad/ by walking up from its own location; override with SQUAD_ROOT, and the port with SQUAD_PORT.
